snippet.title: Last Meadow Online | Official Announcement Trailer | Discord
snippet.description:
Available now on Discord desktop and browser: https://discord.com/last-meadow-online

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Learn more in our blog: https://discord.com/blog/last-meadow-online-announcement

_*Discord-Based Massively Multiplayer Incremental Role Playing Game :)_

snippet.title: Project R.O.A.C.H. | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Some ideas strike you like a hoof to the head. Ten years ago, our team was inspired with a brand-new idea: revolutionize gaming with a controller unlike any other. This April 1, we’re introducing R.O.A.C.H., a controller to make your next adventure in the Continent more realistic and tactile than ever before.

Ride off into the sunset on R.O.A.C.H. today: thewitcher.ly/ROACH

—

No hobby horse was harmed during the production of this video. This video is an April Fools joke. The hobby horse shown was not produced, licensed or sold by or on behalf of CD PROJEKT RED and does not constitute any official collaboration with its manufacturer - Horse&Toys ( https://horse-toys.pl/ ).

snippet.description:
IYE, premier extrait de l’album Holo Horéma, résonne comme une douce déclaration d’amour. La chanson dévoile l’âme d’un être profondément épris, qui murmure ses sentiments à travers des promesses sincères, des mots tendres, des serments empreints d’éternité tout en évoquant les imperfections qui sont inévitables pour chaque couple d’amour. 
En essence, IYE est une ode à l’amour, une promesse délicate déposée au creux du cœur.

snippet.title: ASA - Acrocanthosaurus Official Release Trailer
snippet.description:
We’re thrilled to welcome yet another long-awaited creature from Garuga123’s ARK: Additions into the official world of ARK: Survival Ascended. These incredible creatures continue to bring fresh gameplay, new challenges, and some seriously epic tames to the ARK.

The Acrocanthosaurus is stomping onto the scene as a brutal frontline powerhouse. Built for the thick of battle, this massive carnivore truly shines when the fight turns against it. The longer the fight goes, the more fearsome it becomes, turning injuries into momentum and refusing to back down when others might fall.

But it is not just a savage attacker. The Acrocanthosaurus has a defensive edge that makes it especially formidable in a survivor’s hands, able to hold the line, draw attention, and weather the chaos head-on. 
Whether charging into danger or standing firm against it, this creature will command the battlefield by sheer presence alone.

snippet.description:

Regisseur Travis Knight bringt das legendäre Franchise MASTERS OF THE UNIVERSE in dem gleichnamigen epischen Live-Action-Abenteuer zurück auf die große Leinwand. Nach 15 Jahren der Trennung führt das Schwert der Macht Prinz Adam (Nicholas Galitzine) zurück nach Eternia und er entdeckt, dass seine Heimat unter der heimtückischen Herrschaft von Skeletor (Jared Leto) in Trümmern liegt. Um seine Familie und seine Welt zu retten, muss sich Adam  mit seinen engsten Verbündeten zusammenschließen – Teela (Camila Mendes) und Duncan alias Man-At-Arms (Idris Elba) – und sein wahres Schicksal als He-Man annehmen, den mächtigsten Mann des Universums.
